scope: source-grounded semantic commissioning followed by a frozen Chapters 1-3 production run
baseline_boundary: b39f364 — run-011 closed INCONCLUSIVE; no run-011 prose or context configuration promoted
last_accepted_product: live Chapters 1-2 from runs 002 and 004; unchanged by runs 005-012
observed_failure: plan-only commissions carry inference limits but omit permitted attribution and source texture; Opus fills the missing narrative connective tissue with invented relationships, identities, circumstances, outcomes, and efficacy
causal_rivals: lossy evidence compression in the plan-only commissioning boundary causes narrativization
Opus's persuasive prior invents material even when a commission contains adequate grounded source texture
single_generic_lever: expand the existing model-led commissioner's evidence boundary from canonical plan only to canonical plan plus only the accepted source packets behind the target chapter's assigned evidence, and preserve minimum usable grounding in its natural-language output
lever_components_are_one_mechanism: the commissioner prompt amendment and added packet inputs jointly instantiate source-grounded commissioning; neither is an independent prose rule or workflow

source_grounding_contract.required_change: behavior-agnostic natural-language instruction to read only the target-assigned accepted packets and preserve minimum factual texture, provenance, quotation basis, and inference limits
source_grounding_contract.forbidden: fixed packet schema, field checklist, source dump, prose outline, section sequence, reasoning procedure, specimen wording, observed-failure wording, or mechanical extraction
source_grounding_contract.freeze: commit and independently audit before any commission or prose call

contract_audits.finding: old blanket quote rule conflicted with packet-authorized source quotations
contract_audits.action: narrowed the generic rule before any commission call

contract_audits.finding: corrected prompt cleanly instantiates one universal, model-led source-grounding boundary without schema, checklist, prose planning, or reference leakage

fixed_research_boundary.exclusions: no research synthesis, unassigned packet, source outside accepted research, analysis/reference material, judge output, or run history

commission_generation.inputs: frozen commissioner prompt, complete canonical plan, one target chapter ID, and only that chapter's listed accepted source packets
commission_generation.set_freeze: all three complete and hashed before the source-fidelity audit; no manual edits
commission_generation.transport_wrapper_exact: Use only the embedded commissioner contract, canonical master plan, target chapter ID, and accepted source packets. Do not inspect the filesystem, use outside knowledge, or import material from any source not embedded for this target. Return only the contract output.

commission_audit.inputs: canonical plan, all three frozen commissions, and the exact accepted packets supplied to their commissioners
commission_audit.checks: semantic ownership, source attribution, exact quotation, permissions, inference limits, material omissions, and imports
commission_audit.pre_prose_gate: all three must be materially faithful and source-grounded; any material defect makes H-049 INCONCLUSIVE before prose
commission_audit.infrastructure_note: the primary native context made two failed attempts to invoke an unavailable collaboration helper despite multi_agent being disabled; no helper result entered the audit, and the primary context completed normally

writer_contract.output_allowance: request catalog maximum, then use the greatest exact shared allowance authorized after input
chapter_inputs: immediately previous run-012 final chapter candidate only; none for Chapter 1
writer_contract.excluded: canonical master plan, raw source packets, research syntheses, other commissions, non-adjacent chapters, history, other-chapter reviews, metrics, judges, and reference material
writer_contract.revision_dispatch: same generic run-010 revision dispatch; current candidate plus raw latest review only
writer_contract.review_cycles: maximum three candidates per chapter under unchanged shared inputs; no Chapter 1 revision is considered before the complete first-draft batch is frozen and measured
writer_contract.continuation: complete all three first drafts even if an earlier chapter fails; C-02 R1 sees committed C-01 R1 without its verdict or review, and C-03 R1 then sees committed C-02 R1 without its verdict or review

R1_catalog_attempt.result: HTTP 402 before inference; zero content and charge

R1.review_status: partial diagnostic only — the plan-only reviewer omitted the frozen C-01 source-grounded commission, so its overall REVISE cannot gate H-049 or authorize a revision

R1_catalog_attempt.result: HTTP 402 before inference; zero content and charge

R1.call_id_status: not retained — the transport wrote the completed response artifact, then raised while formatting its relative artifact path before response metadata was persisted
R1.actual_model_status: not retained by the post-write recorder failure; do not infer it as observed metadata

reasoning.reported_reasoning_tokens_status: not retained by the post-write recorder failure

R1.usage_status: prompt tokens, completion tokens, cost, provider, runtime model, finish reason, call ID, and reported reasoning tokens were not persisted; the response is not resampled
R1.artifact_status: complete first response, frozen unedited; begins with Chapter 2 anatomy and ends with SUMMARY
R1.recorder_failure: ValueError after artifact write because a relative output path was passed to Path.relative_to against an absolute repository root
R1.review_status: not started — the complete first-draft batch is frozen for objective, source-grounded specialist, and blind target-panel measurement
R1.length_status: FAIL — above the 3,600-word upper edge of the existing +/-20% gate for the 3,000-word commission

R1_catalog_attempt.result: HTTP 402 before inference; zero content and charge

R1.artifact_status: complete first response, frozen unedited; begins with Chapter 3 anatomy and ends with SUMMARY
R1.transport_status: response and provider metadata retained; absolute output path avoided the C-02 post-write recorder defect
R1.review_status: not started — the complete first-draft batch is frozen for objective, source-grounded specialist, and blind target-panel measurement
R1.length_status: FAIL — above the 3,120-word upper edge of the existing +/-20% gate for the 2,600-word commission

founder_directed_measurement_correction.reason: the first Chapter 1 review saw the canonical plan but not the frozen source-grounded C-01 commission whose handoff H-049 tests

authority_boundary.non_authoritative: the overall REVISE and objections to attribution or details expressly authorized by the omitted commission cannot gate H-049, score source-grounding fidelity, or trigger a Chapter 1 revision
authority_boundary.diagnostic_only: independently checkable craft, anatomy, chapter-job, instruction-boundary, and length observations remain recorded as hypotheses for the complete product measurement; no observation is silently discarded
authority_boundary.unscored_until_grounded_review: any disputed inference or source-use claim requires a specialist given the frozen commission and other context necessary for that claimed judgment

frozen_sequence: completed: C-02 R1 used committed C-01 R1 as its sole previous chapter
completed: C-03 R1 used committed C-02 R1 as its sole previous chapter
completed: the C-01-C-03 first-draft batch is frozen before any revision decision
next: run objective evaluation, a source-grounded evidence-fidelity specialist review, and the blind target panel across the batch even if an internal review failed
founder_directed_measurement_correction.prohibited_now: do not revise a chapter, amend an asset, alter a commission, change a threshold, or form a new hypothesis before the required complete-batch measurements

judge_instrument_reset.authority: founder-directed workflow reset before any run-012 target-panel observation
judge_instrument_reset.mechanism: the legacy prompt mixed efficacy, craft, integrity, and authorship detection in one chapter role and counted reversed orders as independent votes; Stage-A v2 separates specialist roles, evaluates cumulative jobs at block scope, and collapses reversed orders into one instability-audited observation
roles: method integrity and epistemic safety — complete three-chapter block
judge_instrument_reset.matrix: every configured model × every role target × both A/B orders; two models and three chapters produce 20 raw judgments and 10 collapsed observations
judge_instrument_reset.quality_boundary: no authorship or real-Carr detection field enters the v2 prompt, schema, aggregate, or gate
required_controls: intact reference must stably beat its locally degraded copy
judge_instrument_reset.comparability: run-012 is the first v2 product baseline; no v2 score may be compared numerically with a legacy score
judge_instrument_reset.causal_separation: the measurement reset is not a factory lever and cannot support H-049; H-049 is decided by the separately preregistered source-grounded specialist review
judge_instrument_reset.legacy: explicit --prompt remains available only for historical reproduction
judge_instrument_reset.status: PENDING — complete first-draft batch frozen; controls and target panel are next

held_constant: accepted research corpus, framing, canonical plan, evidence assignments, chapter jobs, and source permissions
complete style guide, chapter-writer prompt, chapter-reviewer prompt, objective thresholds, and H-049 causal rules; the judge reset is separately recorded as a new non-comparable measurement baseline
Opus 4.6 Anthropic writer with reasoning disabled
fresh Sol-ultra commission, audit, and chapter-review contexts
maximum three ordinary review cycles per chapter
no shared amendment after any commission generation or prose
first_draft_target_blocker: invented or altered source relationship, attribution, identity, demographic, circumstance, quotation, outcome, mechanism, prevalence, efficacy, or inference; or evidence imported outside the chapter's grounded commission

prediction.causal: all three commissions are source-faithful and carry enough permitted concrete texture that all three Opus first drafts contain zero material evidence inventions
prediction.product: all chapters accept and the complete Chapters 1-3 product passes length, craft, objective, and blind Stage-A gates

causal_decision_rule.supported: all three commissions pass pre-prose source fidelity and all three first drafts have zero material evidence invention under source-grounded specialist review
causal_decision_rule.refuted: all three commissions are faithful and adequately concrete, yet material evidence invention appears in at least two first drafts or survives any chapter's final cycle
causal_decision_rule.inconclusive: any commission is materially unfaithful; accepted evidence cannot support an assigned prose job; one isolated first-draft invention is repaired; or the source-grounded specialist evidence is ambiguous

product_decision_rule.pass: all three chapters ACCEPT within the fixed cycles and the complete set passes existing length, craft, objective, and blind Stage-A gates
product_decision_rule.fail: any final chapter remains unaccepted or the complete set fails an existing product gate
product_decision_rule.separation: a product failure does not by itself refute the source-grounding mechanism, and causal support does not promote prose or establish product parity

stop_and_no_tuning_rules: freeze prompt and all three commissions before Chapter 1 prose
no shared amendment, packet repair, packet resample, reviewer change, threshold change, or chapter-specific instruction after prose begins
do not stop the three-chapter causal sample merely because Chapter 1 fails
freeze the complete first-draft batch before any revision decision

validate both Stage-A v2 prompt controls under the exact target-panel model and reasoning configuration before interpreting a product judgment; a control failure invalidates the instrument but does not alter the frozen batch

run objective evaluation, a source-grounded evidence-fidelity specialist review, and the blind target panel across the complete first-draft batch even if an internal review or mechanical gate fails; failures remain measurements rather than truncation gates
do not promote semantic improvement without full product passage

anti_overfit.genericity: the shared asset describes the universal accepted-packet to assigned-evidence to commission handoff; it contains no behavior, chapter, specimen, bad-sentence, or reference-book content
anti_overfit.sample: the exact frozen contract runs across three chapter jobs and source families without mid-run change
anti_overfit.future: a Stage-A pass remains calibration-only until zero-amendment stability, full-book Stage B, and untouched caffeine Stage C

product_promotion_bar: no run-012 asset enters canon main; Stage-A support still requires zero-amendment stability, Stage B full-book parity/surpass, and Stage C zero-tuning caffeine generalization
